But since we can add pairs of any button (which don't change the effect), the combination is allowed if t ≤ presses and (presses - t) is even. Because adding (presses - t)/2 pairs of any button (each pair adds 2 presses and no effect) will reach exactly presses presses.

So for each combination, compute t = b1 + b2 + b3 + b4. If t <= presses and (presses - t) is even, then it's allowed.

Once allowed, compute the 6-element representation for the bulb states.

How to compute the 6-element representation:

For each bulb i from 1 to 6:

Compute its type based on i mod 6.

For each type, compute the flip count mod 2 based on the buttons pressed.
